headline: Is QUALCOMM (QCOM) Quietly Recasting Its Legacy Handset Story Through Dividends and AI Bets?
summary: Earlier this month, Qualcomm Incorporated declared a quarterly cash dividend of US$0.92 per common share, payable on June 25, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 4, 2026, while also featuring CEO Cristiano Amon at high-profile events such as the Semafor World Economy conference and the upcoming COMPUTEX 2026 keynote. At the same time, multiple analyst downgrades and concerns about Qualcomm’s memory-constrained handset business contrast with its push into AI wearables, automotive, and...
